_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your real values. config.json is read at startup; the api_key is never hardcoded in source.
_ctx_comment: Ollama defaults are far too small for this pipeline (num_ctx=2048, num_predict=128). 64K context / 8K output is the comfortable starting point for typical 1-3 sheet drawings. Bump num_ctx to 131072 for large multi-sheet assembly drawings.
